title: Breast implants: Evidence and safety reviews - Canada.ca
content:
## Breast implants: Evidence and safety reviews
- What you should know
- Breast implant illness
- Health Canada's role
- Evidence and safety reviews
- Report a problem or concern
In our commitment to openness and transparency, we publish summaries of our safety reviews on medical devices like breast implants. These summaries complement other safety-related information to help Canadians make informed decisions.
The summaries outline what was assessed, what was found and what actions, if any, were taken by Health Canada.
You can subscribe to receive information on authorized breast implants. Timely and relevant updates include:
- safety or recall information
- current data on breast implant-associated anaplastic large cell lymphoma reported to Health Canada
Subscribe to get breast implant updates
- Safety reviews and decisions
- Health Canada publishes its safety review on breast implant illness representative symptoms and diseases (August 9)
- Health Canada launches opt-in subscription service for breast implant updates (April 6)
- Health Canada publishes Canadian surveillance data blog on breast implant-associated anaplastic large cell lymphoma (BIA-ALCL) (April 6)
- Health Canada updates its safety review of BIA-ALCL (April 6)
- Health Canada suspends Allergan's licences for its Biocell breast implants after safety review concludes an increased risk of cancer (May 28)
- Health Canada's intention to suspend Allergan's Biocell breast implants licences (April 4)
- Health Canada to update its safety review of breast implants (February 12)
- Health Canada encourages medical device incident reporting (January 15)
- Breast implants - risk of anaplastic large cell lymphoma (BIA-ALCL) (November 24)
- Health Canada safety review finds low incidence of breast implant-associated anaplastic large cell lymphoma (BIA-ALCL) reported in Canada (November 24)

### Pre-market reviews: 2001
- Preparation of a premarket review document for breast implant and tissue expander device licence applications (February 25)

## Safety reviews and decisions
Scientific and regulatory considerations about breast implants are found in the summary safety reviews and decisions on the drug and health product register . An up-to-date list follows.

#### Summary safety reviews: 2017
